title: Glad-Labs/poindexter
summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

title: dotradepro/SelenaCore
summary: Offline-first smart-home hub — FastAPI core + modular plugins, local voice (Vosk STT + Piper TTS + Ollama LLM), presence, automations. Raspberry Pi / Jetson / generic Linux, Ukrainian + English out of the box.

title: NeptuneHub/AudioMuse-AI
summary: AudioMuse-AI is a self-hosted, Dockerized music playlist generator using sonic analysis to discover related tracks for Jellyfin, Navidrome, LMS, Lyrion, and Emby: no metadata or external APIs needed.

title: AhmadAli33297/virtual
summary: 🚀 Rebase your Fedora installations effortlessly with "virtual," leveraging the latest atomic builds for a secure and smooth experience.

title: isma9127/query-genie
summary: 🧞 Transform natural language into actionable insights with QueryGenie, a robust AI platform for intelligent database interaction and real-world deployment.

title: haseeb-321/devflow-ai
summary: 🚀 Generate SEO-optimized technical articles from GitHub repositories effortlessly with DevFlow AI. Enhance your content quickly and effectively.

title: haritha8503/langextract
summary: 🌐 Extract languages from text seamlessly using LangExtract. Simplify language detection and enhance your projects with ease and accuracy.

title: Alakaroud/vuln-structure
summary: 🔍 Extract and structure security vulnerability data from unstructured text with ease using the lightweight Python package, vuln-structure.

title: nishantsunuwar/MoCE
summary: 🌟 Implement Mixture-of-Clustered-Experts (MoCE) to improve expert specialization and generalization in instruction tuning with advanced routing mechanisms.

title: judy-kyalo/llm-structured-summary
summary: 📝 Summarize text using LLMs to generate structured insights from research titles or abstracts, making data easy to understand and reuse.

title: siddsachar/Thoth
summary: Thoth - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: lingcoder/crab-code
summary: 🦀 Open-source alternative to Claude Code, built from scratch in Rust. Agentic coding CLI — thinks, plans, and executes with any LLM. Compatible with Claude Code workflows.

title: kacchanff/agent-playground
summary: 🛠️ Experiment with AI agents in a local sandbox to run, score, and compare outputs without the need for complex frameworks.

title: pardnchiu/Agenvoy
summary: Agentic framework | Intelligent multi-provider routing | Sandbox execution

title: gskrishna3838/Whisperer-on-Wirst
summary: 🤖 Create your private AI companion on your wrist for local, emotionally aware assistance with no internet required. Customize and hack it to suit your needs.

title: jgoy-labs/server-nexe
summary: Local AI server with persistent memory, RAG, and multi-backend inference (MLX / llama.cpp / Ollama). Runs entirely on your machine — zero data sent to external services.

title: Payton2cool4/LLMs-local
summary: 🚀 Explore tools and resources to run large language models locally, enhancing efficiency and control over your AI applications.
